calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
